blocks.content: Every table full. Every table already decided. First day and the whole room already knows where it stands.
Center table. Of course it's the center table.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: They found me. Open seat right there — come on.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: Two spots down from you isn't really sitting with you.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Bro it's the same table. Stop analyzing and sit down.
Maya's near the windows. She already looked up. Already gave me a nod like she was saving me a decision.
I've been standing here too long.

options.label: Jonathan's table. That's where you belong.
Head toward Maya. She already knows your name.
Find somewhere quiet. Don't make it a test.
